note: Consumer .stories.tsx using high-risk DS primitives (DataTable/Dialog/Sheet/Popover/DropdownMenu/Tooltip/HoverCard/LinkInput/RadioGroup/CircularProgress/AppShell/Sidebar) must carry @story-baseline: marker.
